commits: 90c5a37 — fix PathFollower maxYawRate unit mismatch (1.5→80 deg/s)
3671eb9 — disable freeze logic for omni-dir robot (freezeAng=180), expose local planner params
d1463f0 — revert omni-dir mode: robot turns to face movement direction

p0_forward.details: Robot reaches (6,0) from (0,0). ~11s total including ClickToGoal relay delay. Routes north around wall (suboptimal but functional).

p0_backward.details: Robot reaches (-6,0) from current position. Robot turns to face direction.

cross_wall_right.details: Robot at (0,0) → (5,0) across wall at x≈3. Routes south around wall bottom (y<-1.1). 3-node path.

cross_wall_left.details: Robot at (6.3,0) → (1,0) across wall. Successfully routes around wall. 3-node path.

findings.wall_polygon: Wall detected as poly with vertices at (2.9,-1.0) to (4.3,1.6). Contour detection produces proper closed polygon from accumulated obstacle cloud via MapHandler.
findings.cross_wall_routing: Working! IsNavNodesConnectFreePolygon correctly blocks edges through wall polygon. IsEdgeBlockedByObstacles ray-cast blocks a few additional edges. Robot routes around wall via contour nodes at wall corners.
findings.path_quality: For p0_forward, robot sometimes goes NORTH around wall (y≈2.6) instead of south (y≈-1.1). Both valid but north is longer. This is a graph connectivity issue — the initial contour nodes may have better visibility edges going north.
findings.goal_edges: Goal typically connects to 6-9 nodes out of 24-40 total. Polygon collision blocks 17-28 edges, ray-cast blocks 0-2.
findings.omni_dir_reverted: omni_dir_goal_threshold=0.5, no omni_dir_diff_threshold. Robot turns to face movement direction as requested.

remaining_issues.path_optimality: Robot sometimes takes longer path around wall. Could be improved with more exploration or better graph connectivity.
remaining_issues.clicktogal_spurious: ClickToGoal sets goal to current position on stop_movement, causing FAR to chase spurious goals. Not fixed.
remaining_issues.sim_stability: DimOS sim process sometimes exits unexpectedly. Not related to navigation changes.
